product_overview: Time Tracker is a simple local web app for recording work time on tasks, either with a live timer or with manual hour/minute entry. It also lets users organize work by projects, filter task history by date and project, and view summary hours and task counts for a selected period.
core_goals: Record completed tasks with either manual time entry or a live timer
Browse and filter task history by date range and project
Review total hours and task counts for the selected period
Create, rename, and remove projects while keeping task history intact

features.name: Task list and filters
features.description: Lets users review all recorded tasks in history and narrow the list by date range and project, including clearing applied filters and deleting tasks.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the task history -> Select a start date and an end date -> Select a project filter -> View the filtered task list and summary cards -> Clear the filters
Navigate to / -> Select the "Sem projeto" filter -> View only unassigned tasks
Navigate to / -> Select a specific project filter -> View only tasks associated with that project
Navigate to / -> Choose a task in the history -> Delete the task -> Confirm deletion -> See the task removed from the list

features.name: Create manual task
features.description: Allows users to register a finished task by entering a name, optionally associating a project, and setting the total duration manually in hours and minutes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the new task dialog -> Enter the task name -> Optionally choose a project -> Choose manual time entry mode -> Enter hours and minutes -> Submit the form -> See the new task added as finished
Navigate to / -> Open the new task dialog -> Leave the task name empty -> Enter a duration -> Submit the form -> See validation feedback for the missing name
Navigate to / -> Open the new task dialog -> Enter the task name -> Enter zero duration -> Submit the form -> See validation feedback for invalid duration

features.name: Timer task
features.description: Allows users to start a single active timer for a task, pause and resume it, and stop it to finalize the task with recorded elapsed time.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the new task dialog -> Enter the task name -> Optionally choose a project -> Choose timer mode -> Start the timer -> Pause the timer -> Resume the timer -> Stop the timer -> See the task finalized with saved duration
Navigate to / -> Open the new task dialog -> Enter the task name -> Choose timer mode -> Start the timer -> See the task marked as running
Navigate to / -> Open the new task dialog -> Enter the task name -> Choose timer mode -> Start the timer -> Pause the timer -> See the task paused
Navigate to / -> Open the new task dialog -> Enter the task name -> Choose timer mode -> Start the timer -> Stop the timer -> See the task completed and moved to the finished state

features.name: Reports summary
features.description: Shows aggregate hours and task counts for the currently filtered period on the task page.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select a date range -> Optionally select a project filter -> View the total hours card and task count card for the selected period
Navigate to / -> Select a different date range -> View the summary cards update to match the new period

features.name: Project management
features.description: Lets users create new projects, rename existing projects, and remove projects with soft delete so older tasks keep their project history.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the projects view -> Enter a new project name -> Add the project -> See it appear in the active project list
Navigate to / -> Open the projects view -> Choose an existing project to rename -> Enter a new name -> Save the change -> See the updated name reflected in the project list and related tasks

Navigate to / -> Open the projects view -> Choose an existing project to remove -> Confirm deletion -> See the project disappear from active selection options while historical tasks keep their association

routes.description: Single-page shell with sidebar navigation between Tarefas and Projetos views

features.name: Task list and filters
features.description: View tasks with date range and project filters, clear filters, delete tasks
user_interactions: Select start and end dates in filter fields
Select project filter (Todos, Sem projeto, or active project)
Click Limpar filtros to reset filters
Click Excluir on a task and confirm deletion

features.name: Create manual task
features.description: Register a finished task with name, optional project, and manual hours/minutes
user_interactions: Click + to open Nova tarefa modal

features.name: Timer task
features.description: Start, pause, resume, and stop a single active timer per session
user_interactions: Start timer after entering task name

features.name: Reports summary
features.description: Display total hours and task count for the filtered period on the Tarefas page
user_interactions: Apply date/project filters and view Horas totais and Tarefas no periodo cards

features.name: Project management
features.description: Create, rename, and soft-delete projects on the Projetos page
user_interactions: Enter new project name and click Adicionar projeto
Click Renomear and save new name

known_limitations.issue: No dedicated reports page; per-project report breakdown from project.md is not implemented in UI
known_limitations.impact: Only general summary cards are shown, not per-project report table

known_limitations.issue: No client-side router; navigation is in-app state only
known_limitations.impact: Deep links to /projects are not available
